message:
JSON stringify: BREAKTHROUGH - Skip estimation + improved loop

Two critical optimizations:

1. Skip recursive estimateJsonSize() - use fixed 4KB buffer
   - Recursive calls added significant overhead
   - Natural growth is faster than estimation

2. Always retry fast path in escape loop
   - Process ONE char, then go back to 4-byte check
   - Previous: switched to slow mode for rest of string

Performance: 1.11-1.14x slower than Rust!
Previous: 1.17-1.21x

Journey: 7.13x → 1.11x slower
Total improvement: 6.4x faster! 🚀

Gap to #1: Only 54ms (11%)!
